target: July 24th
Shinpei-san, what do you think of Mio?
W-Wait...! What are you asking, Tokiko!?

…W-what do you mean…
Well, I guess…
Of course I care about her.
As family.
Family, huh~~~.
Hey! Jeez, Tokiko!! Don't ask weird things!!
*Ahem!* Shinpei...!
I just got a call from my dad. He said Karikiri-san will be free after the fireworks and the Umi-okuri ceremony are over!
Okay… then until then--
What's wrong, Shinpei!
...J-Just now, over there...!
(That figure from behind... Ushio?)
(That can't be... I'm sure I just imagined it, but...)
Why don't we go up to the shrine grounds? You can see the fireworks well from there.
That figure from behind is bothering me
I probably just imagined it
1. Live Stage
(...I just imagined it. There's no way she'd be here.)
Hey, Shinpei?
Ah, yeah, no...
(That just now must have been... an illusion shown to me by the regret of not being able to keep my promise to Ushio.)
Shin-chan, what's wrong? You're spacing out, aren't you?
I… I'll protect Mio…
(Ushio…)

(I know.
Leave Mio to me…)
What's wrong? You've been quiet for a while now.
...It's nothing.
For saying it's nothing, you were staring pretty intently at Mio in her yukata.
Huh!? N-No, I wasn't!
Wh-What's with you, Tokiko!? Aren't you saying some weird things?
Really? We don't get chances like this often, so I thought I'd ask what I can while I can.
…Huh?
What you can ask...?
*Ahem!*
More importantly, if we keep dawdling, the fireworks will start.
Y-Yeah! Let's hurry to the shrine grounds.
...Tokiko. Does my yukata look weird or anything? Is the obi coming undone?
It's fine. There's no problem even if Shinpei-san stares at you intently.
Th-That's not what I meant!!
Oh, there's a ton of people. Are they all here for the fireworks?
It seems that's not the case this year. Look, over there.
What is that…?
(A girl with a microphone is waving on top of a small stage?)
The people around there sure are energetic. Their excitement is through the roof.
It's just like an idol's live performance.
What are you talking about! Not "just like," she's a real idol!
Huh, r-really?
Apparently they called her from the mainland to do a live at the festival. She's a member of some famous group or something.
Jeez! You're so cool about it, Tokiko. The Koyuba Kaori-chan came all the way here, you know?
What, Koyuba Kaori!?
Huh, Koyuba Kaori!?
See? This is the normal reaction.
Ah, no, I just...
A live by Koyuba Kaori? Why isn't something that important on the festival poster!?
Isn't it like a secret live?
But there's a bunch of people who look exactly like fans gathered around, right? Even though not even the locals were told about it!
Yeah, maybe the information spread online.
If she's that famous of an idol, there's probably a network of people following her around.
(Koyuba Kaori... That's the Koyuba-san I met at the port, right?)
(Don't tell me that Koyuba-san is... an idol?)
Everyone~~~~! Good evening~~~~~!!
Good evening~~~~~~!!!
(No mistake, this voice is Koyuba-san. ...Even though her impression is quite different from when I met her at the port.)
Whoa... The fans' voices are perfectly in sync, like they've been trained.
You're right~.
I want to make the festival even more exciting with my singing! Everyone, lend me your strength!
Yeeeaaaaah~~~~~~!!!
Oh, photography is okay!? Let's take some too, Shinpei!
No, I don't really need to...
Onii-chan, were you a fan of hers?
No, I'm not really a fan or anything, but I figured I'd take one since it's a good opportunity.
(Everyone is completely absorbed, holding up their smartphones...)
Whoa, that's bright...!
It really is. The camera flashes have been crazy for a while now. She must be super popular.
Alright, I got it! Oh, it looks pretty good!
Show me, show me!
Wow, she really is cute. As expected of an idol. She's super sparkly.
It makes sense why everyone falls for her like this.
N-No, I'm not!
Huh?
I think I'll delete it after all. I don't know what it's called, but there are rights and stuff for this kind of thing, right?
Portrait rights?
Yeah, that's it!
But it seems like photography is okay, so isn't it fine? Though it might be bad to upload it to the internet.

It's fine!
I don't need it!
Eh, what a waste.
Onii-chan...
(Ah... I see, Sou...)
Alright then, the first song! Here we go!
Wow! Amazing, amazing! It's the real deal! Kaori-chan is moving and singing~!!
Hahaha, what are you saying? Of course she is, she's the real thing, you know?
Jeez, Shin-chan!
Oh wow, the fans are getting really hyped up too.
(If the Shadows don't attack in front of people, then a lively place is safer... I came here thinking that, but...)
(With a live like this being held, it's even more convenient.)
(If I spend the time until the Umi-okuri like this, and then meet Karikiri-san afterwards...)
Ah, the fireworks went off!
A live with fireworks in the background! That's the best!
Yeah, it's nice and lively.
KYYAAAAAAH!!!!
Did you hear something just now?
It sounded... like a scream...
Hiiiieee!! H-Help meeeee!
Wh-What the hell!?
Everyone! Run away!!
Huh? Eh? What?
Run away, she says...
Giyyaaaaaaah!!
Hiiiiiiieeee!! Gyaaaaaahhh!!
Run awayyyy!!
Uwaaaaaahhh!!
Hiiiiiieeee!!
Uwah!?
(This is bad! The panicked crowd is rushing in, and I can't move freely...!)
Shinpei! Where are you!?
Here! I'm here!
Onii-chan, where are you!? People are in the way!!

Mio…!
Where is Mio!?
I'm here!

Shin-chan, where are you!?
I can only hear your voice!
Mio! Toki-chan! It's dangerous to go against the flow of the crowd!
Ride the flow and get out of here! Let's meet up at the shrine approach!
Got it!!
Yes!!
You good with that too, Sou!?
Yeah, that works! See you later then!
Yeah!!
(Sou is one thing, but are Mio and Toki-chan going to be okay!?)
(It won't be a laughing matter if I trip here.)
Kyaaaaah!!
(Was that... Koyuba-san just now!? Did she get left behind because she was on stage!?)
(If she wanted to, she could have been the first to escape. And yet, for everyone's sake...!)
Koyuba-san, I'm coming right now!
S-Shadow!?
(Four arms... What the hell is this Shadow...!)
What a nice, lively night. This is truly fitting for the final day.
Ah!?
(Wh-What is this... People are lying all over the shrine grounds...)
(Did this guy... do this...?)
However, if it weren't for someone's interference, I could have done this much more easily. Isn't that right, miss?
A-Aah...!
You should have just run away by yourself, but going out of your way to let your fans escape first? Thanks to you, I had to put in extra effort.
A-Ajiro-kun! Help me!
Koyuba-san!?
I won't let you interfere any further.
Let go of Koyuba-san!!
(What's that sound!?)
Oh, can you not see well? My apologies, please take a good look.
Ah…!
(A black shadow is spreading across the shrine grounds... And when people touch it...)
(People are... disappearing...? Like they're being swallowed by the shadow...)
Ah yes, you told me to let go, didn't you.
Ah...
(...This is bad. The shadow on the ground has already reached her feet. If Koyuba-san touches the shadow now...)
Very well. Yes, goodbye.
Koyuba-san!!
Huh?
A-Aah...
(Wh-What the hell is this...)
(What's happening...? It's impossible, I can't comprehend this...)
I'll protect Mio…
(That's right, Mio... I have to... protect Mio...!)
Your right eye… could it be?
(I'm sorry, Koyuba-san!!)
